summary: Patch pass applied for the round-2 plan-review findings. The plan now makes Phase 5 the first full-suite gate, gives Phases 1-4 focused gates, fills the Phase 4 resume sweep durability test body, stages ADR/telemetry/fixture paths in the atomic Phase 3 commit, aligns ADR-019 with the audit-store-only migration and batch-status I1b witness, handles SQLite WAL sidecars in deploy/rollback, restores the application ref during rollback, and fixes paste-invalid snippets and ambiguous constants/imports. Rerun plan-review round 3 before execution.

remediated_blocking_issues.resolution: Narrowed Phase 3 and Phase 4 to focused gates and made Phase 5 the first full pytest tests/ gate.
Replaced the docstring-only resume sweep placeholder with a parametrized public resume() durability test covering I1a/I1b, FAILED finalization, row preservation, and flush-before-sweep ordering.
Added rollback commands that restore the saved application ref before restoring pre-ADR-019 audit data.
Updated SQLite deploy and rollback commands to checkpoint WAL after stopping writers and copy/delete/restore audit.db, audit.db-wal, and audit.db-shm consistently.
Added the ADR, telemetry source/tests, and AST fixture corpus to the Phase 3 atomic staging list.
Rewrote the formatter regression snippet to construct a LineageResult and call LineageTextFormatter().format(result), matching current tests.
Patched ADR-019 migration policy to preserve sessions.db and scope delete-and-recreate to the Landscape audit store unless a separate session migration proves otherwise.
Added mypy, ruff check, and ruff format gates for Phase 4 touched source/tests before the Phase 4 commit.
Updated illegal-pair pytest match strings to match the planned stable error text.

remediated_warnings.resolution: Made contracts.audit.DISCARD_SINK_NAME the canonical sentinel in the plan and instructed web/engine snippets to import it instead of duplicating literals.
Clarified TokenOutcome direct construction covers shape invariants while recorder/loader constraints own required/exact/forbidden discriminator fields.
Rewrote the contracts/audit.py import instruction to remove only RowOutcome from the grouped enum import while preserving still-used enums.
Added TerminalOutcome and TerminalPath string-compare guards to the Phase 1 inventory Definition of Done.
Normalized Phase 4 counts around six cross-table tests and five durability cases, with explicit fresh/resume I1a/I1b plus graceful-shutdown skip coverage.
Fixed the final RowOutcome allowlist wording to consistently describe the final 3-entry shape.
Made copied snippets ruff-clean by asserting returned outcome IDs and removing unused RecorderFactory imports.
Patched ADR-019 I1b wording to make the batch-status witness canonical instead of deferring clarification to a follow-up.
Moved the operator migration stub ahead of schema compatibility tests/errors by making it Task 1.1a and the guard Task 1.1b.

recommendations: Keep Phase 5 as the first full-suite gate unless the plan deliberately moves all repo-wide test triage earlier.
Before executing the operator runbook, replace placeholder paths/refs with deployment-specific values and get explicit operator approval for destructive database operations.
